qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_recurso as ID, t.c_recurso as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PRY05_RECURSOS as t, PRY02_TAREAS_REC , PRY02_TAREAS, PRY02_TAREAS_REQ, PRY01_PROYS_REC, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Recursos.RECURSO\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN t.oi_recurso LEFT OUTER SEC.id, PRY02_TAREAS_REC.oi_tarea_req INNER PRY02_TAREAS_REQ.oi_tarea_req, PRY02_TAREAS_REQ.oi_tarea INNER PRY02_TAREAS.oi_tarea, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_proy_rec INNER PRY02_TAREAS_REC.oi_proy_rec, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_recurso INNER t.oi_recurso, t.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PRY02_TAREAS.oi_tarea = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_tarea} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_recurso as ID, t.c_recurso as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PRY05_RECURSOS as t, PRY02_TAREAS_REC , PRY02_TAREAS, PRY02_TAREAS_REQ, PRY01_PROYS_REC, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Recursos.RECURSO\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN t.oi_recurso LEFT OUTER SEC.id, PRY02_TAREAS_REC.oi_tarea_req INNER PRY02_TAREAS_REQ.oi_tarea_req, PRY02_TAREAS_REQ.oi_tarea INNER PRY02_TAREAS.oi_tarea, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_proy_rec INNER PRY02_TAREAS_REC.oi_proy_rec, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_recurso INNER t.oi_recurso, t.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE t.c_recurso={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} AND PRY02_TAREAS.oi_tarea = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_tarea} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_recurso as ID, t.c_recurso as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PRY05_RECURSOS as t, PRY02_TAREAS_REC , PRY02_TAREAS, PRY02_TAREAS_REQ, PRY01_PROYS_REC, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Recursos.RECURSO\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN t.oi_recurso LEFT OUTER SEC.id, PRY02_TAREAS_REC.oi_tarea_req INNER PRY02_TAREAS_REQ.oi_tarea_req, PRY02_TAREAS_REQ.oi_tarea INNER PRY02_TAREAS.oi_tarea, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_proy_rec INNER PRY02_TAREAS_REC.oi_proy_rec, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_recurso INNER t.oi_recurso, t.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PRY02_TAREAS.oi_tarea = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_tarea} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
